chapter_title.ar: باب فِيهِ نُكَتٌ وَ نُتَفٌ مِنَ التَّنْزِيلِ فِي الْوَلَايَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 108 – Points and pickings from the Revelation regarding the Wilayah

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالسابق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (78/ 5)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالسابق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (78/ 5)
text: هَكَذَا نَزَلَتْ هَذِهِ الْآيَةُ وَ لَوْ أَنَّهُمْ فَعَلُوا ما يُوعَظُونَ بِهِ فِي عَلِيٍّ لَكانَ خَيْراً لَهُمْ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Mihran, from Abdul Azeem, from Bakkar, from Jabir,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘This is how this Verse was Revealed [4:66] and if they had done what they were Advised with regarding Aliasws, it would have certainly been better for them’.
en.sarwar: 60. Ahmad has narrated from ‘Abd al-‘Azim from ibn ’Udhayna from Malik al-Juhanni who has said the following “I asked abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) about the meaning of the words of Allah. “. .He has revealed this Quran to me to warn you and those who will receive it . “. [6:19] The Imam (a.s.) said, “It means, whoever of the family of Muhammad (s.a.) will be the Imam he will warn people by means of the Holy Quran just as the Messenger of Allah did.”.
